text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: After Iran, Israel cannot live without an enemy. We see that they are in search of developing a new rhetoric and declaring Turkey as the new enemy. We observe this not only in Netanyahu, but also among some figures in the Israeli opposition.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：继伊朗之后，以色列离不开敌人。我们看到他们正在寻求发展一种新的言论，并将土耳其宣布为新的敌人。我们不仅在内塔尼亚胡身上观察到这一点，在以色列反对派的一些人物中也观察到了这一点。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The spokesman for Iran’s Khatam al‑Anbiya headquarters said that the security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman is either for everyone or for no one. If the security of Iranian ports is threatened, no port in the Gulf or Oman Sea will be safe. He reiterated that enemy vessels have no right to transit the Strait of Hormuz, while other vessels may do so in compliance with Iranian armed forces regulations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚总部发言人表示，波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么属于无人。如果伊朗港口的安全受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全。他重申，敌方船只无权通过霍尔木兹海峡，而其他船只可以在遵守伊朗武装部队规定的情况下通过。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy interior minister Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian said U.S. President Trump’s threat to “destroy our civilisation” is more a joke born of ignorance than a serious analysis. He stated that those who do not understand Iran’s civilisation cannot grasp its depth, even if infrastructure is targeted. He added that when Iranians’ national pride is wounded, they rally in the streets to defend their country, and that even those with grievances against the system show fierce defence when faced with an external threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗内政部副部长阿里·阿克巴尔·普尔贾姆希迪安表示，美国总统特朗普关于“摧毁我们文明”的威胁与其说是严肃的分析，不如说是出于无知的笑话。他指出，那些不了解伊朗文明的人，即使基础设施成为目标，也无法理解其深度。他补充说，当伊朗人的民族自尊心受到伤害时，他们会走上街头保卫国家，即使是那些对体制有不满的人，在面对外部威胁时也会表现出激烈的防御。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部2个地区激活：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 纳哈里亚及以色列北部对抗线周边地区激活无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 Due to developments in the Middle East, European farmers are being forced to switch to fertilizers from North Africa, North America, and Russia - the Russian Security Council If the current trajectory of the Middle East conflict persists through the summer, the world could face the largest surge in global food inflation in recent years. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 由于中东的事态发展，欧洲农民被迫转向使用来自北非、北美和俄罗斯的化肥 - 俄罗斯安全委员会。如果当前的中东冲突轨迹持续到夏季，世界可能会面临近年来全球食品通胀的最大涨幅。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，而南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。寻求这种合作有什么战略逻辑，他们也无法向我解释。这很可能是外部压力下强加给政府的。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has captured Bint Jbeil’s stadium, where in 2000 former Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah delivered a victory speech famously describing Israel as “weaker than a spider web." “Bint Jbeil 2000: There was someone here who spoke and boasted about webs and spiders. Today, that man no longer exists, the stadium is gone, and his words are worth nothing,” said 98th Division commander Brig. Gen. Guy Levy. “Bint Jbeil 2026: Our forces control the area, destroying terror infrastructure and dozens of terrorists.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军队占领了宾特朱拜勒体育场，2000年，前真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉曾在此发表胜利演讲，称以色列“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。“宾特朱拜勒2000：这里曾有人谈论并吹嘘网和蜘蛛。今天，那个人已经不存在了，体育场也不复存在，他的话一文不值，”第98师指挥官盖伊·利维准将说。“宾特朱拜勒2026：我们的部队控制了该地区，摧毁了恐怖基础设施和数十名恐怖分子。” @wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊与以色列关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其危险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家都没有单独奉行的政策，这其中有非常有趣的方面。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部2个地区激活：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: Pope Leo told Reuters he didn't "want to get into a debate" with Trump. "I don't ‌think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in ‌the way that some people are doing," he said. "I will continue to speak out loudly against war, looking to promote peace, ⁠promoting dialogue and multilateral ​relationships among the states to look ​for just solutions to problems," ​he said.
text_zh: 教皇利奥告诉路透社，他“不想与特朗普进行辩论”。他说：“我不认为福音的信息应该像某些人那样被滥用。”他说：“我将继续大声疾呼反对战争，寻求促进和平，促进国家间的对话和多边关系，以寻求解决问题的公正方案。”

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature." The only issue Lebanon’s ambassador can raise is achieving a ceasefire. “If we achieve a ceasefire, it is a good thing; if not, the ambassador cannot cross this red line,” he said. A senior Hezbollah official told RIA Novosti that the Lebanese government’s stance against Hezbollah threatens to split the country. He did not rule out the possibility of replacing the government under pressure from popular protests. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Salam have separated the Lebanese issue from the Iranian issue, and Iran will not be allowed to interfere. The meeting will focus on the need for a ceasefire before talks – a Lebanese condition that has not yet received an Israeli response. Hezbollah’s deputy political chief, Mahmoud Qamati, criticised the Lebanese government for rushing to negotiate with Israel under fire. “Aren’t you ashamed? You, Prime Minister, are not ashamed to go and negotiate while Israel warns you not to talk about a ceasefire?” He added that Israel wants to disarm Hezbollah, calling that an internal Lebanese issue, and warned that external forces are leading Lebanon into anarchy and destruction. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿举行，级别为大使级。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅表示，此次会议不是为了谈判，而是为了“进行后勤性质的讨论或谈话”。黎巴嫩大使唯一能提出的问题是实现停火。“如果我们实现了停火，那是件好事；如果没有，大使不能越过这条红线，”他说。一位真主党高级官员告诉俄新社，黎巴嫩政府反对真主党的立场威胁到国家分裂。他不排除在民众抗议的压力下更换政府的可能性。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和总理萨拉姆已将黎巴嫩问题与伊朗问题分开，伊朗将不被允许干涉。会议将重点讨论在谈判前实现停火的必要性——这是黎巴嫩的一个条件，但尚未得到以色列的回应。真主党副政治领导人马哈茂德·卡马蒂批评黎巴嫩政府在炮火下急于与以色列谈判。“你们不感到羞耻吗？总理先生，当以色列警告你不要谈论停火时，你难道不为去谈判而感到羞耻吗？”他补充说，以色列想要解除真主党的武装，称这是黎巴嫩内部问题，并警告说外部势力正在将黎巴嫩引向无政府状态和毁灭。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated The General Staff of Ukraine reported that during the "regime of silence" from 4:00 PM on April 11 to April 12, Russia itself violated it over 10,000 times. This includes 1,567 artillery shellings of our positions, 119 assaults, and 9,035 kamikaze drone strikes. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部报告称，在4月11日下午4:00至4月12日的“静默制度”期间，俄罗斯自身违反了该制度超过10,000次。这包括对我们阵地的1,567次炮击、119次突击和9,035次神风特攻队无人机袭击。推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 Iran's military warns no Gulf ports will be safe if its own are threatened. - AFP. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 伊朗军方警告称，如果其自身港口受到威胁，波斯湾将没有港口是安全的。 - 法新社。推文

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz on Hungary's election results: "I am personally very grateful and relieved about this clear election result in Hungary. This shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many believe. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference. Right-wing populism suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 德国总理默茨谈匈牙利选举结果：“我个人对匈牙利这次明确的选举结果感到非常感激和宽慰。这表明我们的民主社会比许多人认为的更具韧性。我们的民主制度能够抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨败。匈牙利向全世界发出了反对右翼民粹主义的明确信号。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel French President Emmanuel Macron: "Every effort must be made to reach a solid and lasting settlement of the conflict in the Middle East through diplomacy, a settlement that provides the region with a robust framework allowing everyone to live in peace and security. To achieve this, all substantive issues must be addressed with lasting solutions, Iran's nuclear and ballistic activities, its destabilizing actions in the region, the resumption of free and unimpeded navigation through the Strait of Hormuz as soon as possible, and ensuring Lebanon returns to the path of peace with full respect for its sovereignty and territorial integrity. France is ready to play its full part, as it has been working to do consistently since the first day of the conflict. Regarding the Strait of Hormuz, we will organize with the United Kingdom, in the coming days, a conference with countries ready to contribute alongside us to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation in the strait. This strictly defensive mission, distinct from the belligerents, will be deployed as soon as the situation allows." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：“必须尽一切努力通过外交手段达成中东冲突的稳固和持久解决，这一解决方案为该地区提供了一个强有力的框架，使每个人都能在和平与安全中生活。为实现这一目标，必须通过持久的解决方案解决所有实质性问题，包括伊朗的核和弹道活动、其在该地区的破坏稳定行动、尽快恢复通过霍尔木兹海峡的自由和无阻碍航行，并确保黎巴嫩在充分尊重其主权和领土完整的情况下重返和平之路。法国准备发挥其全部作用，正如自冲突第一天起一直致力于做的那样。关于霍尔木兹海峡，我们将在未来几天与英国一起组织一次会议，邀请那些准备与我们一道为恢复海峡航行自由而进行和平多国任务的国家参加。这项严格防御性的、区别于交战方的任务将在情况允许时立即部署。”推文

text: Open Source Intel We are getting hints that the Islamic regime is getting close to coming back to the table. The military pressure is helping. Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: "As far as I can see, there is currently a sincere need on both sides for a ceasefire. Of course, there is always the Israel factor, Israel's disruptive role here must always be taken into account. At the moment, both the Americans and the Iranians have returned home. I believe the Iranians, in particular, will evaluate the proposal made by the Americans and will give a response." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我们得到暗示，伊斯兰政权正接近重返谈判桌。军事压力正在发挥作用。土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：“据我所知，目前双方都有真诚的停火需求。当然，总有以色列因素，以色列在这里的破坏性作用必须始终被考虑在内。目前，美国人和伊朗人都回国了。我相信伊朗人，特别是，会评估美国人提出的建议并给予回应。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: The 98th Division has encircled Bint Jbeil and begun an assault on the town. More than 100 Hezbollah operatives killed in close-quarters and aerial combat over the past week. Dozens of terror sites destroyed, hundreds of weapons found. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：第98师已包围宾特朱拜勒并开始对该镇进行突击。过去一周在近距离和空中战斗中击毙了100多名真主党武装人员。摧毁了数十个恐怖据点，发现了数百件武器。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkey's FM on the Strait of Hormuz: An international force faces "many difficulties." Says it needs to be opened through diplomacy. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043608998193090753/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部长谈霍尔木兹海峡：国际部队面临“许多困难”。称需要通过外交手段开放。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043608998193090753/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: "As far as I can see, there is currently a sincere need on both sides for a ceasefire. Of course, there is always the Israel factor, Israel's disruptive role here must always be taken into account. At the moment, both the Americans and the Iranians have returned home. I believe the Iranians, in particular, will evaluate the proposal made by the Americans and will give a response." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：“据我所知，目前双方都有真诚的停火需求。当然，总有以色列因素——以色列在这里的破坏性作用必须始终被考虑在内。目前，美国人和伊朗人都回国了。我相信伊朗人，特别是，会评估美国人提出的建议并给予回应。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel The soccer field in Bint Jbeil where Nasrallah delivered his famous 2000 "Spider's Web" speech has been destroyed. The IDF now controls the town. 98th Division commander Brig. Gen. Guy Levy to his troops: "The man who boasted about webs and spiders no longer exists. Neither does the field. His words are worth nothing." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 纳斯鲁拉2000年发表著名的“蜘蛛网”演讲的宾特朱拜勒足球场已被摧毁。以色列国防军现在控制了该镇。第98师指挥官盖伊·利维准将对他的部队说：“那个吹嘘网和蜘蛛的人已经不存在了。场地也不存在了。他的话一文不值。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Lebanese official to Nidaa al-Watan: The collapse of U.S.-Iran talks will not affect direct Lebanon-Israel negotiations in Washington tomorrow. "Iran will not be allowed to regain control of the situation in Lebanon." The official said the IDF is pushing to capture Bint Jbeil before talks begin to negotiate from a position of force. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩高级官员对Nidaa al-Watan表示：美伊谈判的破裂不会影响明天在华盛顿举行的黎巴嫩与以色列的直接谈判。“伊朗将不被允许重新控制黎巴嫩局势。”该官员表示，以色列国防军正在推动在谈判开始前占领宾特朱拜勒，以便从实力地位进行谈判。推文

text: As the war with Iran dragged on, Israel’s interception rate dropped sharply. At the start, only about 5% of Iranian missiles got through, but in the final week, that rose to 27%. Most of the missiles that hit (about 4 out of 5) carried cluster munitions, and Israel did not have an effective, dedicated defense against them. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 随着与伊朗战争的拖延，以色列的拦截率急剧下降。起初，只有约5%的伊朗导弹突破了防御，但在最后一周，这一比例上升到了27%。大多数命中的导弹（约5枚中的4枚）携带了集束弹药，而以色列没有针对它们的有效专用防御手段。来源：国土报

text: BIG: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Syria: Israel’s postponed policies toward Syria carry certain risks. Because of the ongoing war in Iran, Israel may not be taking certain steps right now, but that does not mean it will not do so later. It may simply not be their priority at the moment. That does not mean it will not become a priority later, when the time comes. For now, our Syrian brothers and sisters are engaged in serious diplomatic efforts. However, as I said, Netanyahu and his team’s perspective on this issue is clear. We are aware of it, and we are taking our own measures accordingly.
text_zh: 重磅：土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈叙利亚：以色列对叙利亚推迟的政策带有一定的风险。由于伊朗战争的持续，以色列现在可能没有采取某些步骤，但这并不意味着以后不会。这可能只是目前不是他们的优先事项。这并不意味着当时间到来时，它不会成为优先事项。目前，我们的叙利亚兄弟姐妹正在进行严肃的外交努力。然而，正如我所说，内塔尼亚胡及其团队在这个问题上的观点是明确的。我们意识到了这一点，并正在相应地采取我们自己的措施。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部对抗线地区激活。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部对抗线地区激活。 @wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UK Prime Minister: We do not support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and will not enter any war (with Iran) under any pressure
text_zh: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 英国首相：我们不支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡，也不会在任何压力下参与任何（与伊朗的）战争

text: German Chancellor Merz on Hungary election results: I am personally very grateful and relieved about this clear election result in Hungary. This shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many believe. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference. Right-wing populism suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨谈匈牙利选举结果：我个人对匈牙利这次明确的选举结果感到非常感激和宽慰。这表明我们的民主社会比许多人认为的更具韧性。我们的民主制度能够抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨败。匈牙利向全世界发出了反对右翼民粹主义的明确信号。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: The effort to expand territory has always been one of Israel’s objectives. It was waiting for an opportunity to implement this, and after October 2023 it saw that such an opportunity had opened up. Essentially, Israel is not pursuing security, but rather more territory. It presents this expansionism under the guise of security needs. As this becomes more exposed, international awareness grows, and the political rhetoric surrounding the issue begins to shift and produce different effects.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：扩张领土一直是以色列的目标之一。它一直在等待机会实施这一点，2023年10月之后，它看到了这样的机会已经出现。本质上，以色列追求的不是安全，而是更多的领土。它以安全需求为幌子来展示这种扩张主义。随着这一点变得越来越暴露，国际意识增强，围绕该问题的政治言论开始转变并产生不同的影响。

text: Keir Starmer: Whatever the pressure, Britain will not be dragged into the Iran war. We’re not supporting the blockade.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：无论压力如何，英国都不会被拖入伊朗战争。我们不支持封锁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF spokesperson Avichay Adrae released a statement: Israeli forces from the 98th Division have completed the encirclement of Bint Jbeil and begun an offensive operation inside the town. The statement said paratroopers, commando units, and the Givati Brigade are expanding ground operations to reinforce forward positions, claiming over 100 Hezbollah fighters were killed and multiple sites and weapons caches were destroyed. The IDF added that operations will continue against Hezbollah and that it will act to prevent threats to Israeli civilians. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人阿维查伊·阿德拉伊发表声明：来自第98师的以色列军队已完成对宾特朱拜勒的包围，并开始在镇内进行进攻行动。声明称，伞兵、突击队和吉瓦提旅正在扩大地面行动以加强前沿阵地，声称击毙了100多名真主党武装人员，并摧毁了多个据点和武器库。以色列国防军补充说，将继续针对真主党采取行动，并将采取行动防止对以色列平民的威胁。 @wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: When you look at the main topics currently under negotiation, it may not be technically realistic to expect them to be finalized and signed into a comprehensive agreement within 15 days. If the parties make good progress, an additional ceasefire period could come onto the agenda — perhaps 45 days or even 60 days — so that negotiations can continue and problems can be resolved during that time.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：当你审视目前正在谈判的主要议题时，期望在15天内完成并签署全面协议在技术上可能并不现实。如果各方取得良好进展，额外的停火期可能会提上议程——也许是45天甚至60天——以便谈判能够继续，问题能够在那段时间内得到解决。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ⚰️ ☠️ A pro-war Z-propagandist, Maksim Kalashnikov, described the battlefield as a “drone meat grinder” for Russian soldiers. 🔹 He effectively acknowledged that the value of an average Russian soldier is extremely low, contrasting recruitment promises of around 5 million rubles with the reality of being sent into high-risk “kill zones” where they are exposed to Ukrainian kamikaze drones. 🔹 According to this view, Russian commanders treat such losses as an acceptable and even “profitable” trade-off. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ⚰️ ☠️ 一位亲战的Z派宣传员马克西姆·卡拉什尼科夫将战场描述为俄罗斯士兵的“无人机绞肉机”。 🔹 他实际上承认，普通俄罗斯士兵的价值极低，将约500万卢布的招募承诺与被送往高风险“杀戮区”并暴露在乌克兰神风特攻队无人机下的现实进行了对比。 🔹 根据这种观点，俄罗斯指挥官将此类损失视为一种可接受甚至“有利可图”的权衡。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV has departed Rome for Algeria, marking his first trip to Africa as pontiff. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043605721934139523/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 教皇利奥十四世已离开罗马前往阿尔及利亚，这是他作为教皇首次访问非洲。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043605721934139523/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical In a new statement, Iran's military command threatens the seaports of Gulf countries in response to the US blockade. "The security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of ​​Oman is either for everyone or for no one." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在一份新声明中，伊朗军方指挥部威胁要针对海湾国家的港口，以回应美国的封锁。“波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么属于无人。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JustinTrudeau : Hungarians voted for change and a renewed commitment to democratic institutions after years of erosion under Viktor Orbán. A powerful and positive signal to democracies around the world that citizens can reclaim institutions and restore respect for rights. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @JustinTrudeau : 在维克多·欧尔班多年的侵蚀下，匈牙利人投票支持变革，并重新承诺维护民主制度。这是一个向世界各地民主国家发出的强大而积极的信号，即公民可以收回机构并恢复对权利的尊重。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Pakistani Army Chief Asim Munir and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif to visit Saudi Arabia within the next 48 hours. - Geo News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043603705199518071/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫将在未来48小时内访问沙特阿拉伯。 - Geo News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043603705199518071/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Philippines officials accuse Chinese-linked boats of using cyanide in disputed Spratly waters, calling it “sabotage” that could damage reefs and fish stocks. (PhilStar Global) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043601411728900536/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 菲律宾官员指责与中国有关联的船只在有争议的斯普拉特利群岛（南沙群岛）水域使用氰化物，称这是可能破坏珊瑚礁和鱼类资源的“破坏行为”。(PhilStar Global) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043601411728900536/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says it is close to capturing Hezbollah stronghold Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon, after a major offensive led by the 98th Division. The military says forces encircled the town, then pushed in, killing over 100 Hezbollah operatives, destroying infrastructure and seizing large amounts of weapons. “Over the past week, the forces completed the encirclement and launched an offensive in the town of Bint Jbeil,” the IDF said. Operations are ongoing, with commanders estimating a few more days to eliminate remaining fighters and secure the area. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军表示，在第98师领导的重大攻势后，它已接近占领黎巴嫩南部的真主党据点宾特朱拜勒。军方表示，部队包围了该镇，随后推进，击毙了100多名真主党武装人员，摧毁了基础设施并缴获了大量武器。“过去一周，部队完成了包围并对宾特朱拜勒镇发起了进攻，”以色列国防军表示。行动正在进行中，指挥官估计还需要几天时间来消灭剩余的武装人员并确保该地区安全。推文

text: Open Source Intel Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: We need China to open up so that Europe does not have to close itself. Our trade deficit with China grew 18% last year. That is unsustainable. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043600711791808514/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯在中国：我们需要中国开放，这样欧洲就不必关闭自己。我们去年对中国的贸易逆差增长了18%。这是不可持续的。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043600711791808514/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index United Kingdom Prime Minister says his country will not be involved in blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 英国首相表示，他的国家不会参与封锁霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: As far as I can see, there is currently a sincere need on both sides for a ceasefire. Of course, there is always the Israel factor — Israel’s disruptive role here must always be taken into account. At the moment, both the Americans and the Iranians have returned home. I believe the Iranians, in particular, will evaluate the proposal made by the Americans and will give a response.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：据我所知，目前双方都有真诚的停火需求。当然，总有以色列因素——以色列在这里的破坏性作用必须始终被考虑在内。目前，美国人和伊朗人都回国了。我相信伊朗人，特别是，会评估美国人提出的建议并给予回应。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Lebanese Red Cross center in the city of Tyre, killing the injured being transported and causing damage to the vehicles within the facility. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike on the town of Qlaileh in the Tyre region of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 MTV: 31 tankers loaded with diesel fuel have arrived at the Masnaa border crossing from Iraq as aid to Lebanon, and are now crossing the border point towards the Zahrani refinery. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 MTV：31辆装载柴油燃料的油罐车已从伊拉克抵达Masnaa边境口岸，作为对黎巴嫩的援助，目前正穿过边境点前往Zahrani炼油厂。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Lebanese Red Cross center in the city of Tyre, killing the injured being transported and causing damage to the vehicles within the facility. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了泰尔市的一个黎巴嫩红十字会中心，杀死了正在运送的伤员，并损坏了设施内的车辆。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，在4月13日01:20至09:45之间，他们对谢莫纳基里亚特、多维夫和什洛米定居点以及Matalba阵地进行了火箭弹和无人机袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on Al Mansouri plain, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: An Israeli airstrike killed an infant girl during her father’s funeral in southern Lebanon, in the village of Srifa. The child, reportedly under two years old, was among several family members killed when their home was struck, while her sister was seriously wounded. The Israeli military said it did not have sufficient details on the incident but stated it takes measures to avoid civilian harm. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部Al Mansouri平原。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：以色列的一次空袭在黎巴嫩南部Srifa村的一场葬礼上炸死了一名女婴。据报道，这名不到两岁的女婴在房屋被击中时与几名家庭成员一起丧生，她的姐姐受了重伤。以色列军方表示，没有关于该事件的足够细节，但表示已采取措施避免平民伤害。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
